contents: * Register all Shaka API Docs Stimulus controllers.
* CodeTabs controller — switches between language tabs in a code block.
* Supports both the new .shaka-code-block and legacy .shaka-code-tabs markup.
// Ensure first tab is active if none is
* CopyCode controller — copies the active code panel to clipboard.
* Endpoint controller — collapses / expands endpoint card body.
// Collapsed by default unless data-open attr is set
* Sidebar controller — handles mobile open/close + TOC highlighting.
// Highlight active link based on current URL
// Remove from all then set active
* Table of Contents controller — auto-builds TOC from headings + scroll-spy.
.shaka-badge--brand   { background: var(--brand-soft);  color: var(--brand);  border: 1px solid var(--brand-muted); }
.shaka-badge--accent  { background: var(--accent-soft);  color: var(--accent-hover); border: 1px solid var(--accent-muted); }
.shaka-badge--danger  { background: var(--danger-soft);  color: var(--danger); border: 1px solid var(--danger-muted); }
.shaka-badge--neutral { background: var(--s-soft); color: var(--t-secondary); border: 1px solid var(--border); }

.shaka-api-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: .3rem; padding: .2rem .6rem; border-radius: var(--r-full); font-size: .75rem; font-weight: 600; background: var(--brand-soft); color: var(--brand); border: 1px solid var(--brand-muted); }
transition: color var(--ease-default), background var(--ease-default), border-color var(--ease-default);
transition: color var(--ease-default), background var(--ease-default), border-color var(--ease-default);
.shaka-code-tabs__tab.is-active { color: var(--code-keyword); background: rgba(125,216,127,.1); border-color: rgba(125,216,127,.25); }
.shaka-api-endpoint-card { padding: 1.25rem; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--r-2xl); background: var(--s-page); box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm); }
.shaka-api-endpoint-card__meta { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: .625rem; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-bottom: .625rem; }

.shaka-api-endpoint-card__path { font-family: ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: .85rem; color: var(--t-secondary); padding: .2rem .5rem; background: var(--s-subtle); border-radius: var(--r-md); border: 1px solid var(--border-soft); }
.shaka-api-endpoint-card__responses { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: .4rem; padding: 0; margin: 1rem 0 0; }

.shaka-api-endpoint-card__responses li { display: inline-flex; gap: .35rem; padding: .2rem .55rem; border-radius: var(--r-full); font-size: .8rem; font-family: ui-monospace, monospace; background: var(--s-soft); border: 1px solid var(--border); }
transition: border-color var(--ease-default), box-shadow var(--ease-default), transform var(--ease-enter);

.shaka-api-method         { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-width: 3.5rem; padding: .2rem .55rem; border-radius: var(--r-sm); font-size: .7rem; font-weight: 800; font-family: ui-monospace, monospace; }
.shaka-api-response-table { overflow-x: auto; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--r-xl); background: var(--s-page); box-shadow: var(--shadow-xs); }
.shaka-api-response-table td { padding: .8rem 1rem; text-align: left; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-soft); font-size: .875rem; }
.shaka-api-response-table th { font-size: .75rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: .04em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--t-tertiary); background: var(--s-subtle); }
transition: color var(--ease-default), border-color var(--ease-default), background var(--ease-default);
img, video, svg { display: block; max-width: 100%; }
button, input, select, textarea { font: inherit; }
button { cursor: pointer; border: none; background: none; }
Palette inspirée Removit : vert / jaune / rouge
h1 { font-size: clamp(1.75rem, 4vw, 2.25rem); font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -.035em; line-height: 1.1; color: var(--t-primary); }
h2 { font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -.025em; line-height: 1.25; color: var(--t-primary); }
h3 { font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -.02em; line-height: 1.3; color: var(--t-primary); }
font-family: 'Geist Mono', 'JetBrains Mono', 'Fira Code', ui-monospace, monospace;
overflow: hidden; clip: rect(0,0,0,0); white-space: nowrap;
/* Sidebar hidden by default on mobile, shown with JS toggle */
SHAKA API DOCS — Main stylesheet entry point
type    string  info | success | warning | danger  (default: info)
{% set icons = { info: 'ℹ', success: '✓', warning: '⚠', danger: '✕' } %}

{% if title is defined %}

{{ title }}

{% endif %}

{% if text is defined %}

{{ text }}

{% endif %}
Component: Code Block with Language Tabs
title     string  Header label, e.g. "Request example"
{# ── Legacy alias kept for backwards compat ── #}
{# Old markup used .shaka-code-tabs — still supported via CSS #}
method      string  HTTP verb — GET | POST | PUT | PATCH | DELETE
auth        string  Auth scheme, default "Bearer token"
responses   array   [{ code: int, label: string }]
open        bool    Expand card by default (default: false)
<svg class="shaka-endpoint__chevron" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" aria-hidden="true">
icon   string  Emoji or HTML icon (optional)
{% set text  = text  ?? 'A short feature description.' %}
rows    array   [{ field, type, required?, description, default? }]
{ field: 'id',         type: 'string',   required: true,  description: 'Unique identifier (UUID v4).' },
{ field: 'name',       type: 'string',   required: true,  description: 'Human-readable display name.' },
{ field: 'created_at', type: 'datetime', required: false, description: 'ISO 8601 creation timestamp.' }
{% block title %}{{ api_name ?? 'API' }} — Error codes{% endblock %}
All errors return a JSON object with a consistent structure. Use the error.code field to handle specific cases in your application.
{ field: 'error.code',    type: 'string', required: true,  description: 'Machine-readable error code, e.g. validation_failed.' },
{ field: 'error.message', type: 'string', required: true,  description: 'Human-readable error description.' },
{ field: 'error.details', type: 'array',  required: false, description: 'Array of field-level validation messages.' },
{ field: 'request_id',    type: 'string', required: true,  description: 'Trace ID — include in support requests.' }
description: 'Returned when required fields are missing or invalid.',
Resource does not exist or was deleted.
Unexpected server error. Include request_id in support requests.
text:  'Use exponential backoff when you receive a 429. Check the Retry-After response header for the wait duration.'
text:  'Client errors (400, 401, 403, 404, 422) indicate a problem with the request itself. Fix the request before retrying.'
{{ api_subtitle ?? 'Clean, professional API docs inspired by Stripe, Vercel and Linear — built for Symfony.' }}
text:  'Twig, CSS and Stimulus controllers live in one Composer package.'
text:  'Install with Composer, configure with Flex, preview in seconds.'
text:  'Override CSS tokens or Twig blocks — no rebuild required.'
Every request must include a bearer token in the Authorization header.
text:  'Never expose API keys in client-side code or public repositories.'
description: 'Returns a paginated list of users ordered by creation date.',
description: 'Creates a new user from the provided JSON payload.',
All responses return JSON with the following envelope fields:
{ field: 'data',       type: 'object|array', required: false, description: 'The response payload.' },
{ field: 'meta',       type: 'object',       required: false, description: 'Pagination or extra metadata.' },
{ field: 'error',      type: 'object',       required: false, description: 'Error object present only on failure.' },
{ field: 'request_id', type: 'string',       required: true,  description: 'Unique identifier for support tracing.' }
Detailed documentation for all endpoints. Click any card to expand request details, parameters and responses.
description: 'Returns a paginated list of all users.',
description: 'Retrieve a single user by their UUID.',
{ field: 'id',         type: 'string',   required: true,  description: 'Project UUID.' },
{ field: 'name',       type: 'string',   required: true,  description: 'Project display name.' },
{ field: 'status',     type: 'string',   required: true,  description: 'One of: active, archived, draft.' },
{ field: 'owner',      type: 'object',   required: true,  description: 'Embedded owner user object.' },
{ field: 'created_at', type: 'datetime', required: false, description: 'ISO 8601 timestamp.' },
{ field: 'tags',       type: 'string[]', required: false, description: 'Array of string tags.' }
{# Default navigation groups — override via `sidebar_groups` variable #}
<a class="shaka-api-sidebar__link{% if current_path == item.href or (item.href starts with '/shaka' and current_path starts with item.href) %} is-active{% endif %}"
<a class="shaka-api-topbar__brand" href="/shaka/api" aria-label="{{ api_name ?? 'API Docs' }} home">
<a class="shaka-api-topbar__link{% if current_path starts with link.href %} is-active{% endif %}"
{# Mobile burger — triggers sidebar open via shaka-sidebar controller #}
